message:
fix(cli): trace verify/diff exit codes and duration computation

trace verify now exits with TEST_FAILURE (10) when the trace is invalid.
trace diff now exits with TRACE_MISMATCH (13) when traces diverge.
compute_duration_nanos now returns max-min instead of just max timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
